mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CUSTOMER) AS customerTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CONTRACT) AS contractTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PICKUP_NOTICE WHERE 状态 IN ('待调度', '审核中')) AS pendingDispatchCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(结算金额 - 已收金额), 0) FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE 状态 IN ('待审核', '已审核') AND 结算类型 = 'RECEIVABLE' AND 结算金额 > 已收金额) AS pendingReceiptAmount

SELECT 'CONTRACT_AUDIT' AS type, '待审核合同' AS title, CONCAT('有 ', COUNT(*), ' 个合同等待审核') AS description, COUNT(*) AS count FROM CONTRACT WHERE 合同状态 = '待审核'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DISPATCH_TASK' AS type, '待派单任务' AS title, CONCAT('有 ', COUNT(*), ' 个收运通知等待派单') AS description, COUNT(*) AS count FROM PICKUP_NOTICE WHERE 状态 IN ('待调度', '审核中')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'WAREHOUSING_TASK' AS type, '待入库任务' AS title, CONCAT('有 ', COUNT(*), ' 个总磅单等待入库') AS description, COUNT(*) AS count FROM WEIGHING_SLIP WHERE 状态 = '待细分'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SETTLEMENT_AUDIT' AS type, '待审核结算单' AS title, CONCAT('有 ', COUNT(*), ' 个结算单等待审核') AS description, COUNT(*) AS count FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE 状态 = '待审核'
ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT m.消息标题 AS title, m.消息内容 AS content, DATE_FORMAT(m.创建时间, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS time, CASE WHEN m.消息状态 = '已读' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isRead FROM MESSAGE m WHERE m.接收人编码 = #{userId} AND m.消息状态 != '已删除' ORDER BY CASE m.消息优先级 WHEN '紧急' THEN 1 WHEN '高' THEN 2 WHEN '中' THEN 3 WHEN '低' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, m.创建时间 DESC LIMIT 10
